message:
feat(search): add timing breakdown to robot output format

Enhances the --robot JSON output with detailed timing metrics that
break down where time is spent during search operations. This enables
performance analysis and helps identify bottlenecks in the search
pipeline.

New timing fields in robot output:
- search_ms: Time spent in the core Tantivy search operation
- rerank_ms: Time spent in semantic reranking (0 if disabled)
- other_ms: Remaining time (display formatting, serialization, etc.)

Implementation:
- Captures rerank_start timestamp before reranking begins
- Computes rerank_ms only when semantic_opts.rerank is enabled
- Passes search_ms and rerank_ms through to output_robot_results
- Adds "timing" object to JSON output with the three metrics

The timing breakdown satisfies requirement T7.4 for search pipeline
observability and is useful for:
- Identifying slow queries that need index optimization
- Measuring reranking overhead to tune the rerank threshold
- Debugging performance regressions in CI

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
